BundleVersion.description: Version of the immutable presentation-bundle contract.

PresentationTemporalCapability.description:
Proven relationship between a presentation's output and requested frames.

Unknown presentation code is [`Sequential`](Self::Sequential). Random
access is an explicit claim that each requested frame depends only on
immutable inputs and that exact frame.

oneOf.description: Frames must be evaluated as one screenplay-ordered sequence.
Any requested frame can be evaluated independently.

PresentationVisualCapability.description:
Proven relationship between browser presentation pixels and primary media.

Unknown presentation code is [`BrowserComposite`](Self::BrowserComposite).
A separable overlay is an explicit claim that the browser output is a
transparent foreground independent of the primary video beneath it.

oneOf.description: Chromium owns the complete frame, including primary media.
Chromium owns only a transparent foreground over native primary media.

description: Stable description of one immutable presentation artifact.
title: BundleManifest
